Source   Edit  

Fleet order types and validation for EC4X

Imports

../common/types/core, ../common/types/units, gamestate, fleet, spacelift, starmap, logger, order_types, espionage/types, research/types, economy/construction

Types

BuildOrder = object
  colonySystem*: SystemId
  buildType*: BuildType
  quantity*: int
  shipClass*: Option[ShipClass]
  buildingType*: Option[string]
  industrialUnits*: int
Source   Edit   
BuildType {.pure.} = enum
  Ship, Building, Infrastructure
Source   Edit   
CargoManagementAction {.pure.} = enum
  LoadCargo, UnloadCargo
Cargo loading/unloading actions at colonies Source   Edit   
CargoManagementOrder = object
  houseId*: HouseId
  colonySystem*: SystemId
  action*: CargoManagementAction
  fleetId*: FleetId
  cargoType*: Option[CargoType]
  quantity*: Option[int]
Order to load/unload cargo on spacelift ships at colonies Source   Edit   
DiplomaticAction = object
  targetHouse*: HouseId
  actionType*: DiplomaticActionType
  proposalId*: Option[string]
  message*: Option[string]
Source   Edit   
DiplomaticActionType {.pure.} = enum
  ProposeNonAggressionPact, AcceptProposal, RejectProposal, WithdrawProposal,
  BreakPact, DeclareEnemy, SetNeutral
Diplomatic actions per diplomacy.md:8.1 Source   Edit   
OrderCostSummary = object
  buildCosts*: int
  researchCosts*: int
  espionageCosts*: int
  totalCost*: int
  canAfford*: bool
  errors*: seq[string]
  warnings*: seq[string]
Summary of order costs for preview/validation Source   Edit   
OrderPacket = object
  houseId*: HouseId
  turn*: int
  treasury*: int
  fleetOrders*: seq[FleetOrder]
  buildOrders*: seq[BuildOrder]
  researchAllocation*: res_types.ResearchAllocation
  diplomaticActions*: seq[DiplomaticAction]
  populationTransfers*: seq[PopulationTransferOrder]
  squadronManagement*: seq[SquadronManagementOrder]
  cargoManagement*: seq[CargoManagementOrder]
  terraformOrders*: seq[TerraformOrder]
  espionageAction*: Option[EspionageAttempt]
  ebpInvestment*: int
  cipInvestment*: int
Source   Edit   
OrderValidationContext = object
  availableTreasury*: int
  committedSpending*: int
  rejectedOrders*: int
Budget tracking context for validating orders Prevents overspending by tracking running total of committed costs Source   Edit   
PopulationTransferOrder = object
  sourceColony*: SystemId
  destColony*: SystemId
  ptuAmount*: int
Space Guild population transfer between colonies Source: economy.md:3.7, config/population.toml Source   Edit   
SquadronManagementAction {.pure.} = enum
  TransferShip, AssignToFleet
Squadron and ship management actions at colonies Source   Edit   
SquadronManagementOrder = object
  houseId*: HouseId
  colonySystem*: SystemId
  action*: SquadronManagementAction
  shipIndices*: seq[int]
  newSquadronId*: Option[string]
  sourceSquadronId*: Option[string]
  targetSquadronId*: Option[string]
  shipIndex*: Option[int]
  squadronId*: Option[string]
  targetFleetId*: Option[FleetId]
Order to form squadrons, transfer ships, or assign to fleets at colonies Source   Edit   
TerraformOrder = object
  colonySystem*: SystemId
  startTurn*: int
  turnsRemaining*: int
  ppCost*: int
  targetClass*: int
Order to terraform a planet to next class Per economy.md Section 4.7 Source   Edit   
ValidationResult = object
  valid*: bool
  error*: string
Source   Edit  

Procs

proc addBuildOrder(packet: var OrderPacket; order: BuildOrder) {....raises: [],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
Add a build order to packet Source   Edit   
proc addFleetOrder(packet: var OrderPacket; order: FleetOrder) {....raises: [],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
Add a fleet order to packet Source   Edit   
proc calculateBuildOrderCost(order: BuildOrder; state: GameState): int {.
    ...raises: [KeyError], tags: [], forbids: [].}

Calculate the PP cost of a build order Returns 0 if cost cannot be determined

IMPORTANT: Spaceport Commission Penalty (economy.md:5.1, 5.3)

  • Ships built at spaceports (planet-side) incur 100% PC increase (double cost)
  • Ships built at shipyards (orbital) have no penalty (standard cost)
Source   Edit   
proc createAttackOrder(fleetId: FleetId; targetSystem: SystemId;
                       attackType: FleetOrderType; priority: int = 0): FleetOrder {.
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Create an attack order (bombard, invade, or blitz) Source   Edit   
proc createColonizeOrder(fleetId: FleetId; targetSystem: SystemId;
                         priority: int = 0): FleetOrder {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Create a colonization order Source   Edit   
proc createHoldOrder(fleetId: FleetId; priority: int = 0): FleetOrder {.
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Create a hold position order Source   Edit   
proc createMoveOrder(fleetId: FleetId; targetSystem: SystemId; priority: int = 0): FleetOrder {.
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Create a movement order Source   Edit   
proc getRemainingBudget(ctx: OrderValidationContext): int {....raises: [],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
Get remaining budget after committed spending Source   Edit   
proc initOrderValidationContext(treasury: int): OrderValidationContext {.
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Create new validation context for order packet Source   Edit   
proc newOrderPacket(houseId: HouseId; turn: int; treasury: int = 0): OrderPacket {.
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Create empty order packet for a house treasury: Treasury at order generation time (defaults to 0 for test harnesses) Source   Edit   
proc previewOrderPacketCost(packet: OrderPacket; state: GameState): OrderCostSummary {.
    ...raises: [KeyError, Exception], tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}
Calculate total costs for an order packet without committing Useful for UI preview before submission Source   Edit   
proc validateBuildOrderWithBudget(order: BuildOrder; state: GameState;
                                  ctx: var OrderValidationContext): ValidationResult {.
    ...raises: [KeyError, Exception], tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}
Validate build order including budget check Updates context with committed spending if valid Source   Edit   
proc validateFleetOrder(order: FleetOrder; state: GameState;
                        issuingHouse: HouseId): ValidationResult {.
    ...raises: [KeyError, Exception], tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}
Validate a fleet order against current game state Checks:
  • Fleet exists
  • Fleet ownership (prevents controlling enemy fleets)
  • Target validity (system exists, path exists)
  • Required capabilities (spacelift, combat, scout)
Source   Edit   
proc validateOrderPacket(packet: OrderPacket; state: GameState): ValidationResult {.
    ...raises: [Exception, KeyError], tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}
Validate entire order packet for a house Performs comprehensive validation including:
  • Fleet ownership (prevents controlling enemy fleets)
  • Target validity (systems exist, paths exist)
  • Colony ownership (prevents building at enemy colonies)
Source   Edit  

Exports

FleetOrderType, FleetOrder

Made with Nim. Generated: 1980-01-01 00:00:00 UTC
